steps.title: Compare the endpoints
steps.content: The claim says the number of investigative articles overall has fallen since 2010. To justify that claim, the evidence should compare the beginning of the period with the end and show a lower final value.

steps.title: Use the start-to-end drop
steps.content: B misidentifies 1,600 as the smallest value, C misidentifies 1,000 as the greatest value, and D shows an increase only from 2010 to 2013. The relevant comparison is about 1,000 articles in 2010 versus about 500 in 2019. The answer is A.
